_readme: Edit this file to add/remove countries or competitors, then push to trigger a rebuild. The GitHub Action will regenerate index.html automatically.

_instructions.add_competitor: Add entry to global_competitors with color and description. Then push — the weekly job or manual trigger will regenerate all affected country pages.
_instructions.add_country: Add to the countries list with name and ISO code. Push and run the workflow manually to generate immediately.
_instructions.remove_competitor: Delete from global_competitors. Next rebuild removes them from all countries.
_instructions.change_scores: Scores are AI-generated each rebuild. To pin a specific score, use country_overrides.
_instructions.manual_trigger: GitHub → Actions → 'Update Project Confidence Site' → Run workflow
